title: Publish Catalog Item
description: RJSF form schema for the catalog publishing modal. Captures the user-input fields of the canonical Catalog construct (publishedVersion / class / snapshotURL are server-generated and intentionally absent). Field shape, types, enums, and required list MUST stay a subset of meshery/schemas/constructs/v1beta2/catalog/catalog.yaml; the Go validator at validation/forms_test.go enforces that.

compatibility.title: Technology
compatibility.description: A list of technologies included in or implicated by this design; a list of relevant technology tags.

patternCaveats.title: Caveats and Considerations
patternCaveats.description: Specific stipulations to consider and known behaviors to be aware of when using this design.

patternInfo.title: Description
patternInfo.description: Purpose of the design along with its intended and unintended uses.

type.title: Type
type.description: Categorization of the type of design or operational flow depicted in this design.
